text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 06. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
